events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the inspection conclusion directly to the required JSON file, treating absent or unchanged turn-of-nut match marks as a verification failure for pretensioned structural bolting.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /tmp/answer.tmp <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 80,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.92,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Structural bolt assemblies using turn-of-nut pretensioning lack visible match marks or show no required nut rotation.\",
    \"Final pretension cannot be verified from the observed condition.\",
    \"Bolted connection is not acceptable for closeout until installation and inspection records or corrected match marks confirm required rotation.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Hold affected bolted connections from acceptance or cover-up.\",
    \"Identify all affected bolt groups and compare against engineered drawings and bolting specification requirements.\",
    \"Have qualified ironworkers re-snug, mark, rotate, or replace bolt assemblies as required by the approved turn-of-nut procedure.\",
    \"Perform required inspection and document final match-mark position and pretensioning acceptance before closeout.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"Turn-of-nut installation relies on visible match marking and confirmed nut rotation from snug-tight condition to demonstrate the specified pretension. Missing marks or marks that have not rotated indicate the installed bolting cannot be verified and should be treated as defective/non-compliant at rough-complete stage.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts - turn-of-nut pretensioning method\",
    \"RCSC Specification - inspection requirements for pretensioned joints\"
  ]
}
EOF
mv /tmp/answer.tmp /app/answer.json
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json >/dev/null
ls -l /app/answer.json"
